youtube.title: DC Charges Marvel $1 a Year for Captain Marvel - Pokemon Fan Reacts
youtube.description: DC actually owns a character that Marvel made famous and they only charge one dollar a year to use him. The wildest comic book drama you never knew about! #Pokemon #ComicBooks #MarvelVsDC

tiktok.caption: Marvel pays DC $1 a year for this character and its the pettiest thing ever #Pokemon #PokemonFacts #Marvel #DC

instagram.caption: DC really said fine you can use him but that will be one dollar please every single year forever. The pettiest power move in comic book history and I respect it completely. #Pokemon #PokemonFacts #Marvel #DC #CaptainMarvel #Shazam #ComicBooks #SuperheroFacts #NerdCulture #DidYouKnow #MarvelVsDC #ComicHistory
